settings.heading: Heritage Woven into Every Thread.
settings.body_text:
Aurelia Rituals was born from a deep reverence for the ancient Sujni embroidery tradition of Bihar. Each piece — whether a finished cushion or a DIY kit — carries within it the pride, skill, and artistry of the women who make them possible.

We believe in slow making, intentional living, and the quiet power of creation. Our ritual kits invite you to pause, breathe, and stitch your own story.

settings.heading: Watch the Ritual Come Alive
settings.body: Every stitch is an act of intention. Watch how our artisans in Bihar bring centuries of Sujni tradition into a single, mindful canvas — and discover how you can be part of this living art form.
settings.caption: Filmed at our artisan collective in Madhubani, Bihar.

settings.heading: Stitch by Stitch, We Change Lives
Gifts That Stitch Hope
